entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for resistance to shoot fly.

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: The pest Atherigona soccata that causes damage to sorghum.

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE WETNESS
entities.description: The production of water droplets on the folded central whorl leaf of sorghum seedlings.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SHOOT FLY
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to withstand damage from Atherigona soccata.

entities.name: SOIL MATRIC POTENTIAL
entities.description: The measure of the energy state of water in the soil.

entities.name: PLANT WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: The measure of the water status within the plant.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of selecting and developing sorghum genotypes for improved traits.
